items.title: In pictures: Trump hosted by Xi Jinping in Beijing on two-day summit
items.dek: President Trump was welcomed by President Xi Jinping in Beijing for what will be a whirlwind tour.
items.body: President Trump was welcomed by President Xi Jinping in Beijing for what will be a whirlwind tour.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Cuba has run out of diesel and oil, energy minister says
items.dek: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.
items.body: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.
items.author: IriLine Desk
